## Summary

What changed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Data correction
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Design/UI
- [ ] Tests/validation
- [ ] Other

## Data Provenance

If this changes data, include source URLs, fiscal years, page/table references, and confidence status.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Visual check, if UI changed

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything unusual, risky, incomplete, or intentionally deferred?
